title: lipochaeta hastulata
intro: Lipochaeta hastulata, also known as the Ma'o hau hele, is a flowering plant native to Hawaii and is also known as the yellow hau or yellow cotton flower. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lipochaeta hastulata include its ability to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, and infusions for various health benefits, and is also used in traditional Hawaiian ceremonies and rituals.
